description: §15.10 clean neg — a props-block declaration with no colliding bare attribute on the def root SHALL NOT fire E-COMPONENT-012.
rationale: §15.10 fires E-COMPONENT-012 only when a prop name appears both in the props block and as a bare attribute on the same root element. `Badge`'s root `<span class="badge" props={ status: string }>` declares `status` once, only in the props block.
